name: Chocolate Chip Thumprints
recipeIngredient: 1 cup HERSHEY'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place 1/4 cup chocolate chips. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 20-30 seconds or until melted and smooth when stirred; set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, shortening, sugar, reserved melted chocolate, egg yolk, and vanilla. Blend well.
4. Stir in flour and salt. Roll dough into 1-inch balls.
5. With a fork, lightly beat egg white. Dip each ball into the beaten egg white, then roll in chopped nuts.
6. Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart.
7. Press the center of each cookie with your thumb to create an indentation.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and immediately place a few additional chocolate chips in the center of each cookie.
9. Gently remove cookies from the sheet to a wire rack. After several minutes, swirl melted chocolate into each thumbprint.
10. Cool completely.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
